description: Per-component CLI contract conformance results (Plan 018 WI-2). Separate from the frozen v1 feature matrix by design (Sol review): this tracks the horizontal contract effort. A component is recorded here only when the kit runs green in its CI.

agent-suite.notes: Wheel lane (P1) not yet wired. dry-run exit-2 convention resolved: codex-plugins dry-run now exits 0 (plan display is success, not a usage error).
